query: SELECT 'gestantes_modificadas' as acao, g.id, g.nome, g.updatedAt FROM gestantes g WHERE g.clinicaId = 30001 AND DATE(g.updatedAt) = CURDATE() UNION ALL SELECT 'exames_criados', re.id, re.nomeExame, re.createdAt FROM resultadosExames re JOIN gestantes g2 ON re.gestanteId = g2.id WHERE g2.clinicaId = 30001 AND DATE(re.createdAt) = CURDATE() UNION ALL SELECT 'consultas_criadas', cp.id, CAST(cp.idadeGestacional AS CHAR), cp.createdAt FROM consultasPrenatal cp JOIN gestantes g3 ON cp.gestanteId = g3.id WHERE g3.clinicaId = 30001 AND DATE(cp.createdAt) = CURDATE()
